vibe: Automotive luxury, exclusive inner circle, high-octane, precise telemetry

layout.desktop_wrapper: max-w-md mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#050505] relative overflow-hidden shadow-[0_0_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.5)] md:ring-1 md:ring-white/10 md:my-8 md:rounded-[40px]
layout.bottom_nav: fixed bottom-0 left-0 right-0 h-20 bg-black/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-t border-white/5 flex justify-around items-center px-4 pb-safe z-50 md:absolute md:rounded-b-[40px]
layout.top_nav: sticky top-0 z-40 w-full h-16 bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/5 flex items-center px-4 justify-between

button.primary: bg-primary text-white rounded-md font-bold text-sm h-12 px-6 flex items-center justify-center transition-transform hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-95 shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(229,57,53,0.3)]
button.secondary: bg-white/5 text-white rounded-md font-bold text-sm h-12 px-6 flex items-center justify-center border border-white/10 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors
button.premium: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#996515] to-[#D4AF37] text-black rounded-md font-black text-sm h-12 px-6 flex items-center justify-center uppercase tracking-widest shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(212,175,55,0.2)]

card.interactive: hover:border-white/20 transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-2xl hover:shadow-black/50 cursor-pointer
card.premium: bg-[#0F0F11] rounded-xl border border-[#D4AF37]/30 overflow-hidden relative before:absolute before:inset-0 before:bg-gradient-to-b before:from-[#D4AF37]/10 before:to-transparent before:pointer-events-none

input.base: w-full bg-[#1A1A1E] border border-white/10 rounded-md h-12 px-4 text-white placeholder:text-zinc-600 focus:outline-none focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary transition-all font-body

badges.category: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/10 text-xs font-bold text-white uppercase tracking-wider
badges.live: px-3 py-1 rounded-full bg-red-500/20 border border-red-500/50 text-xs font-bold text-red-500 uppercase tracking-wider flex items-center gap-2 before:content-[''] before:block before:w-2 before:h-2 before:bg-red-500 before:rounded-full before:animate-pulse

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure the layout mimics a mobile PWA. Use `max-w-md mx-auto` to center the app on desktop screens, with rounded corners resembling a phone frame.
The primary font for headings is Unbounded. Keep tracking tight.
Implement Scout Black checkout as a mocked UI sequence with a heavy premium feel using the gold gradient and the premium card image.
Apply `data-testid` to all interactive components (buttons, links, inputs).
Use Leaflet/OpenStreetMap for the map integration.
The UI is exclusively dark mode. Avoid using full white backgrounds.
For the bottom nav, use an absolute position if inside the desktop phone frame, but fixed if viewed on mobile.
Use lucide-react or phosphor-icons for filled Material-like icons.
